changelog: Feature: Full Standby Replication — mirror UrBackup to 1+ DR targets via SSH/rsync
Feature: Replication dashboard tab with overview, targets, settings, and alerts
Feature: Per-target run history with step-by-step log viewer
Feature: AES-256-GCM encrypted storage of SSH keys and credentials
Feature: Hook-based and schedule-based replication triggers with debounce
Enhancement: Dashboard stat cards are now clickable links
Enhancement: Dashboard shows replication health card
Fix: Settings pipeline — UrBackup booleans now sent as 1/0 not true/false
Fix: Client settings show correct effective values (group vs client override)
Fix: Global settings (getSettings/setSettings) correctly flatten API response
Fix: Backup trigger now surfaces start_ok=false as a clear error message
Fix: Backup buttons use inline React notification instead of alert()
Fix: ServerSettings save/restore use inline confirm dialogs instead of window.confirm()
